title: EWL Shuttle Bus Replacement - Tanah Merah to Expo

title_translations.zh-Hans: EWL 巴士接驳服务 - 丹那美拉至博览馆
title_translations.ms: EWL Perkhidmatan Bas Pengganti - Tanah Merah ke Expo

updates.text: The shuttle bus service will charge the same fares as train journeys.
